message:
fix(core): broaden differential invalidations to all commits, handle aborted SSI sessions, rustfmt

Emit differential subscriber invalidations for ALL committed writes
(DML + DDL), not just DDL-flagged commits, so that subscribers tracking
DML changes receive their events on the fast-path.  Time-travel
snapshots remain DDL-only.

Handle already-aborted MVCC sessions in commit planning by capturing
the SSI snapshot evidence before returning the error, and improve the
error message to distinguish a missing session from an aborted one.

Remove unnecessary test_serializer guards from six prepared-statement
pager-routing tests that are fully isolated on in-memory or per-tempdir
databases.

Reformat import order, multi-line function calls, and assert macros
(rustfmt 2024 edition) across connection.rs, prepared_hit_rate_proof.rs,
and perf_runner.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
